intro: Weingartia cantargalloensis, also known as Cantagallo's Weingartia, is a species of flowering succulent plant that belongs to the Echeveria family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its reported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and preventing infections.
